title: lathyrus linifolius var. montanus
intro: Lathyrus linifolius var. montanus is a lesser-known variety of the Lathyrus linifolius plant, commonly referred to as the mountain peacock lathyrus or mountain pea, a flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating conditions such as arthritis and other inflammatory diseases. The health benefits of Lathyrus linifolius var. montanus include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
